hints: Assign a value like this: first_name = "Ada". The name goes on the left, the value (in quotes) on the right.
To print a variable, pass it to print() without quotes: print(first_name). With quotes — print("first_name") — prints the literal word, not its value.
If a test says a variable is empty, you probably left the original empty string. Replace the "" with a real value.
